docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LACOMBE, VICTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-12-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLEY, PAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LACOMBE, VICTOR $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET TO ALLOW MORE TIME TO SERVE AND TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLEY, PAMELA
TRIAL RESET TO APR-06-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-03-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PAMELA KELLEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR LACOMBE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERIVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
